air:Brand.Name: ECO FLEX
air:Brand.air:Title: Eco Flex
ECOFLEX
air:Brand.air:Text: Economy Flex lets you choose your seats for free, and you can enjoy more baggage allowance and more flexibility to change your booking.

Economy Flex includes:
• Free seat selection and paid seat selection • Earn 0.7 Skywards Mile for every mile flown • Checked baggage allowance • Cabin baggage 1 bag up to 7kg • Regional multicourse dining • Complimentary alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks • Up to 5,000 channels of entertainment • Free unlimited online chat messaging for Emirates Skywards Gold members • Buy great value Wi-Fi plans • Changes permitted for a fee • Refunds permitted for a fee
Please refer to the terms and conditions of the fare • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the onboard product or service will vary. The content on this screen is for information purposes only. Please validate brands and ancillaries at Fare Quote.

air:Brand.Name: ECO SAVER
air:Brand.air:Title: Eco Saver
ECOSAVER
air:Brand.air:Text: Upgrade to Economy Saver to enjoy more baggage allowance, earn more Skyward Miles and be eligible to upgrade using your Miles.

Economy Saver includes:
• Seat selection available for a fee • Earn 0.3 Skywards Mile for every mile flown • Checked baggage allowance • Cabin baggage 1 bag up to 7kg • Regional multicourse dining • Complimentary alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks • Up to 5,000 channels of entertainment • Free unlimited online chat messaging for Emirates Skywards Gold members • Buy great value Wi-Fi plans • Eligible to upgrade with Skywards Miles at check-in • Changes are not permitted or for a fee • Non-refundable
Please refer to the terms and conditions of the fare • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the onboard product or service will vary. The content on this screen is for information purposes only. Please validate brands and ancillaries at Fare Quote.

air:Brand.Name: ECONOMY CLASSIC
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Classic
ECLASSIC
air:Brand.air:Text: Benefit from more checked baggage allowance and more Q miles

Economy Classic includes - 25kg checked baggage - Carry on 7kg (1 piece) - 50% Qmiles accumulation - Refund to original form of payment (chargeable) - Upgrade with Qmiles - 1 Date Change permitted, chargeable from 2nd Change • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the on-board product or service maybe different to that described above.

air:Brand.Name: ECONOMY CONVENIENCE
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Convenience
ECONVENIEN
air:Brand.air:Text: Benefit from more checked baggage allowance, more Qmiles allowance and seat selection

Economy Convenience includes - 30kg checked baggage - Carry on 7kg (1 piece) - 75% Qmiles accumulation - Standard seat selection - Refund to original form of payment (chargeable) - Upgrade with Qmiles - 2 Date Change permitted, chargeable from 3rd Change • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the on-board product or service maybe different to that described above.

air:Brand.Name: ECONOMY COMFORT
air:Brand.air:Title: Economy Comfort
ECOMFORT
air:Brand.air:Text: Benefit from more checked baggage allowance, more Qmiles allowance, seat selection and penalty-free refunds and changes.

Economy Comfort includes - 35kg checked baggage - Carry on 7kg (1 piece) - 100% Qmiles accumulation - Standard seat selection - Refund to original form of payment (no charge) - Upgrade with Qmiles - Date change allowed • Please note that if the flight is operated by another airline then the on-board product or service maybe different to that described above.
